certifications.title: CASSA Workshop 1: Unclouding Thousand Eyes of Array Radio Telescope
certifications.organization: Center for Astronomy, Space Science & Astrophysics (CASSA), IUB
points: Intensive week-long workshop on radio interferometry and array telescope data processing
Topics: radio telescope fundamentals, interferometry principles, LOFAR architecture, primary beam modeling, calibration techniques, imaging pipelines, data reduction workflows
Hands-on training: Python for radio astronomy, FITS file handling, Astropy and radio astronomy packages, HPC server usage and SLURM job submission

Group project: Developed LOFAR primary beam modeling code in Python; implemented beam pattern calculations, visualized beam response across frequency and sky position, validated against theoretical models
Presented findings to workshop participants and instructors; networked with radio astronomy researchers and professionals

certifications.title: Industrial Attachment: Code Studio Software Company
points: One-month intensive industrial training in machine learning and data science
Topics: ML fundamentals (supervised/unsupervised learning), time series analysis and forecasting (ARIMA, Prophet), feature engineering, model evaluation, real-world ML workflows
Projects: customer churn prediction, sales forecasting, sentiment analysis of product reviews
Gained industry perspective: data quality issues, scalability, production deployment requirements, agile methodology, client communication
